title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: Lead NebulaForge's global marketing strategy across digital channels. You will own demand generation, brand positioning, and performance marketing to drive pipeline for our enterprise cloud security products.
requirements: 5+ years B2B SaaS marketing experience
Proven track record in demand generation and pipeline creation
Expertise in HubSpot, Salesforce, Google Analytics
Experience with ABM (Account-Based Marketing) strategies
Strong data-driven mindset with focus on measurable ROI
Excellent written and verbal communication in English
responsibilities: Define and execute integrated digital marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, social, and email
Own the MQL-to-SQL conversion funnel in partnership with sales
Manage a team of 3 marketing specialists
Drive content strategy aligned to buyer journey stages
Report on campaign performance and marketing-attributed revenue monthly

title: Technical Content Strategist
description: Create and own the technical content roadmap for NebulaForge's security and AI product portfolio. Translate complex technical concepts into compelling narratives for developers, architects, and CISOs.
requirements: 3+ years technical writing or content marketing in cybersecurity or cloud
Deep understanding of cloud security, AI/ML, and DevOps
Experience producing whitepapers, blog posts, case studies, and webinars
Familiarity with SEO tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs) and content management systems
Background in engineering or computer science (preferred)
responsibilities: Produce 8+ high-quality technical content pieces per month
Interview SMEs and translate insights into accessible content
Manage the editorial calendar in collaboration with product and sales
Optimize existing content library for search performance
Support product launches with technical documentation and positioning

title: Enterprise Account Executive
description: Drive new logo acquisition and expansion revenue within enterprise accounts across DACH and Nordics. You will own the complete sales cycle from prospecting through close for 7-figure ARR deals.
requirements: 7+ years enterprise SaaS sales experience
Proven ability to close €500K+ ARR deals
Experience selling cybersecurity or cloud infrastructure solutions
Strong executive presence and C-suite communication skills
Track record of exceeding 120%+ of quota consistently
Fluent in German and English
responsibilities: Manage and grow a territory of 50 enterprise target accounts
Lead complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles (6-12 months)
Develop account strategies and executive relationships
Collaborate with solution engineering on technical evaluations and PoCs
Forecast accurately and maintain CRM hygiene in Salesforce

title: Sales Engineer
description: Partner with our enterprise sales team as the primary technical resource during the sales process. You will lead product demonstrations, architect solutions, and guide customers through proof-of-concept engagements for NebulaForge's AI security platform.
requirements: 5+ years pre-sales engineering in cybersecurity or cloud platforms
Hands-on experience with Azure, AWS, or GCP
Ability to code/script (Python, PowerShell, or similar)
Deep knowledge of identity, network security, and AI/ML security concepts
Excellent presentation and whiteboarding skills
Experience with SIEM, SOAR, and EDR technologies
responsibilities: Lead technical discovery workshops and architecture reviews
Deliver compelling product demonstrations tailored to customer use cases
Design and manage PoC environments
Respond to security questionnaires and RFPs
Build reusable demo assets and technical playbooks

title: Senior Cloud Engineer
description: Design, build, and operate NebulaForge's core cloud infrastructure across Azure. You will drive infrastructure automation, platform reliability, and security-by-default practices across our production environment.
requirements: 6+ years cloud engineering experience, with Azure as primary platform
Expert-level Terraform and Infrastructure as Code practices
Strong Kubernetes/AKS experience in production environments
Azure certifications (AZ-305 or AZ-400 preferred)
Experience with zero-trust network architecture
CI/CD pipeline development with GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps
responsibilities: Architect and maintain multi-region Azure infrastructure
Build and maintain Terraform modules for platform self-service
Implement and enforce infrastructure security controls
Drive SRE practices: SLOs, error budgets, incident response
Mentor junior engineers and conduct code reviews

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Build, evaluate, and harden the AI systems at the core of NebulaForge's security platform. You will work on LLM-powered agents, RAG pipelines, and adversarial AI testing frameworks that protect our customers.
requirements: PhD or 5+ years experience in ML/AI engineering
Production experience with LLMs and Azure OpenAI
Proficiency in Python, PyTorch, and ML experimentation frameworks
Experience with Azure AI Foundry or equivalent MLOps platforms
Understanding of AI security risks (prompt injection, data poisoning, model extraction)
Published research or open-source contributions (preferred)
responsibilities: Design and implement multi-agent AI systems using Azure AI Foundry
Build adversarial testing pipelines for AI red-teaming
Evaluate and mitigate prompt injection vulnerabilities in production agents
Collaborate with product on AI feature development and safety controls
Contribute to NebulaForge's AI security research and publications
benefits: GPU compute credits for personal projects

title: IT Infrastructure Specialist
description: Maintain and evolve NebulaForge's internal IT infrastructure. You will manage endpoints, on-premises networking, Azure AD, and Intune device management for 200+ employees across 3 offices.
requirements: 3+ years IT infrastructure or system administration
Experience with Microsoft 365, Azure AD (Entra ID), and Intune
Networking fundamentals: DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewalls
Windows Server and Linux administration
Basic scripting (PowerShell or Bash)
Helpdesk or end-user support background
responsibilities: Manage Azure AD / Entra ID tenant, conditional access, and MFA
Administer Intune policies for Windows and macOS endpoints
Maintain office network infrastructure and VPN services
Handle L2/L3 escalations from helpdesk
Contribute to IT disaster recovery and backup procedures
benefits: Internal growth path to Cloud Engineer

title: Cloud Systems Administrator
description: Support the day-to-day operations of NebulaForge's Azure-hosted systems. You will ensure high availability of internal platforms, manage patch cycles, and automate operational runbooks.
requirements: 3+ years Azure administration experience
AZ-104 (Azure Administrator) certification required
Experience with Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, and alerting
Familiarity with backup solutions and Azure Site Recovery
Scripting in PowerShell or Azure CLI
ITIL Foundation (preferred)
responsibilities: Monitor and maintain Azure subscriptions and resource health
Manage patch management cycles for VMs and PaaS resources
Create and maintain operational runbooks and documentation
Respond to infrastructure alerts and perform root cause analysis
Support compliance audits with logging and reporting

title: SOC Analyst (Tier 2)
description: Join NebulaForge's Security Operations Center as a Tier 2 analyst. You will triage and investigate security incidents, hunt for threats in our Azure environment, and mentor Tier 1 analysts.
requirements: 3+ years SOC or incident response experience
Proficiency with Microsoft Sentinel and Defender XDR
Understanding of MITRE ATT&CK framework
Experience with KQL for threat hunting
Knowledge of cloud attack techniques (Azure, M365)
Security certifications: SC-200, CompTIA CySA+, or equivalent
responsibilities: Investigate escalated alerts from Tier 1 and SIEM detections
Perform threat hunting across Azure and M365 logs using KQL
Write and tune detection rules in Microsoft Sentinel
Lead incident response for medium-severity events
Mentor Tier 1 analysts and maintain SOC playbooks
benefits: Dedicated lab environment for skill development
Career path to SOC Manager or IR Specialist

title: Cloud Security Engineer
description: Own the security of NebulaForge's Azure cloud platform. You will design security controls, lead threat modeling for our AI/agent systems, and drive Defender for Cloud adoption across all subscriptions.
requirements: 5+ years cloud security engineering
Expert knowledge of Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Sentinel
Experience securing AI/LLM workloads and understanding of AI attack surface
Azure Security Engineer certification (AZ-500) required
Threat modeling experience (STRIDE, PASTA, or MITRE ATLAS)
Background in penetration testing or red team exercises (preferred)
responsibilities: Define and enforce cloud security baseline across all Azure subscriptions
Implement and tune Microsoft Defender for AI and Defender for Cloud
Lead threat modeling sessions for new AI features and agent systems
Conduct security architecture reviews for product and infrastructure changes
Build security automation pipelines for continuous compliance
benefits: Shape the AI security posture of a growing company
